channel.title: Windows on linuxrepos
channel.description: Recent content in Windows on linuxrepos

item.title: Dism++
item.description: Dism++ enables users to modify Windows images before installing them, as well as providing tools to address and repair common issues like missing or corrupted files.

item.title: Ext4 in Windows
item.description: Pulling in EXT4 drives is easy now with Windows WSL2. There are a few tricks that you need to know about though!

item.title: Why Open Source?
item.description: Why is open source done? The developer gives up all his code and potential for profit from the code.

item.title: Thumbnails in Windows
item.description: The thumbnail system in Windows has 4 major configuration areas dating back to 2000. From thumbs.db files, checkboxes, group policy, and registry edits, the Windows thumbnail system is, like everything in Windows, old and layered.
